rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0010
rows.name: Kylie-san, what are you doing here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0030
rows.name: I'm just about to head out to pick up Omomo-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0060
rows.name:
She contacted me just a bit ago, asking for help
because she couldn't carry her luggage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0090
rows.name: She was planning to stay here, wasn't she?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0110
rows.name: Because of that, I said some rude things[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0130
rows.name: she couldn't forget your words, Lin-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0140
rows.name: She said she had mistakenly assumed that being helped by everyone was normal,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0150
rows.name: and she was just trying to run away from doing her best herself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0200
rows.name: I had a feeling that Omomo-san might not come.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0210
rows.name:
But whenever we met, she always had a smile,
and it felt like she had completely accepted her situation,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0220
rows.name: so I couldn't bring myself to ask.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0230
rows.name: And that's why you asked us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0250
rows.name: Well, the result is a huge success, thanks to Lin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0270
rows.name: No, it truly is thanks to you, Lin-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0280
rows.name:
If it were me, I think I would have just listened to Omomo-san
and wouldn't have been able to speak my own opinion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0300
rows.name: I've reaffirmed the importance of properly conveying my feelings in words.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0360
rows.name: We shouldn't keep Omomo-san waiting too long.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32260100_MSG0380
rows.name: Everyone, thank you so much again![ST:wait ]
